stem: On June 1, there were 415 views of a video posted on a website. Every 3 days after June 1, the number of views of the video had increased by 50% of the number of views 3 days earlier. The function v gives the predicted number of views x days after June 1. Which equation defines v?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The growth model is v(x) = a(1 + r/100)x/c, with a = 415, r = 50, c = 3. Substituting gives v(x) = 415(1 + 0.50)x/3 = 415(1.50)x/3. Choice A models 50% (decay) per 3 days. Choices C and D use 3x instead of x/3.
